programme.desc: Olly is feeling the intense pressure of their newfound fame, and it's starting to take a toll on him. He's caught up in the glamour and the spotlight, but it's beginning to cloud his judgment and affect his relationships with his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves - without lifting a finger! Eli thinks it sounds too good to be true... and it is. But exposing the truth draws the ire of the camp's director - and half the campers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Slug Run is the ultimate, off-road, no-holds-barred, cross-cavern Mecha Beast race. Unfortunately, the only thing lower than the odds of beating the three-time champ who's now racing for Dr. Blakk are the odds of Eli making it to the finish line in one piece!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan - and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures. Just when it looks like our heroes are done for, they are helped out of this jam by a most unlikely savior.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot. Only one slinger in all of Slugterra can help Eli make a shot like that - Mario Bravado. Finding the formerly-great-but-now-washed-up Mario is easy. Getting him to help is something else entirely.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted. The bidding is high for this rarest of all slugs, and so is the competition to be the first grab it! Eli and the gang actually beat Slugterra's most vicious slug hunter to the prize-only to find that the hunter is now hunting them!

programme.sub-title: Te deseo más que a nada en el mundo

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: No tengas miedo, simplemente inicia la cinta

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: Como la luz con la que Dios hizo el mundo antes de hacer la luz
programme.desc: En París, Claudia pide un complejo favor a Louis. Mientras tanto, Armand intenta mantener el control dentro de un clan que se encuentra cada vez más inconforme. En Dubái, aumenta la tensión entre Louis y Armand.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: El clan abre un juicio cuyo resultado parece escrito antes incluso de comenzar, pero el testigo principal no recita el testimonio que le habían ordenado narrar.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire

programme.desc: Miguel ya no quiere trabajar para Franco, pero él le pide que vaya con Mia. Mia le pide a Alma que hable con su papá para que la deje cantar en el grupo. Alma le confiesa a Franco que sus hijos falsificaron sus firmas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Ante el problema de la gaceta, Miguel defiende a Mia y dice que él es su novio. Roberta le dice a Luján que Teo se muere por ella, pero Luján no le cree. Gastón agradece a Miguel por haber dicho que él es el novio de Mia.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Soledad se niega a irse del pueblo con Eduardo. Soledad intenta confesarle a Eduardo la verdad sobre el pasado de los Elizalde, pero lamentablemente muere. Eduardo sufre al ver morir a Soledad entre sus brazos.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo le asegura a Jacinto que Bárbara mató a Soledad. Eduardo idea un plan para descubrir la verdadera identidad de Bárbara. Priscila le exige a Anibal que le dé un hijo o de lo contrario se divorciará de él.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo descubre que Liliana sabe que él es hijo de Soledad. Bárbara teme que Gardenia le diga a Fernanda que Soledad está muerta, por lo que idea un plan para deshacerse de ella. Gardenia descubre que Bárbara es amante de Damián.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo descubre que Bárbara está alterando los productos de la fábrica de Gonzalo. Eduardo se molesta al saber que Camilo golpea injustificadamente a Jacinto. Bárbara lleva a cabo sus planes para hacerle creer a todos que Liliana está loca.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que Bárbara es la responsable de que Eduardo se fuera de la hacienda. Eduardo decide quedarse en el pueblo para vengarse de los Elizalde. Eduardo se hace pasar por otra persona para lograr acercarse a Fernanda.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo enfurece al saber que Fernanda está por casarse con Damián. Bárbara le hace creer a Fernanda que Liliana sufre de psicosis paranoide. Priscila intenta seducir a Aníbal, pero las cosas no salen como ella esperaba.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Steve consigue que Eduardo trabaje en la empresa Elizalde. Eduardo cambia de look para evitar que Fernanda y su familia sepan su verdadera identidad. Bárbara sospecha que Eduardo no es el buen hombre que dice ser.

programme.title: Porque el amor manda: Atacado en la cárcel
programme.desc: Pánfilo le propondrá matrimonio a Chatita y Sebastián a Susana. Patricia sigue llorando porque Rogelio está en la cárcel, pero acepta vivir con Alma y Jesús para cuidar a Fernandito de Verónica.

programme.title: Los vampiros de Coyoacán
programme.desc: Hombres vampiros intentan tomar control de un pueblo, pero un médico y unos luchadores tratan de detenerlos.

programme.title: La venganza de la momia
programme.desc: Un profesor pide ayuda para rescatar un tesoro azteca en medio de la selva, y encuentra a una momia con un mensaje.

programme.title: Las Momias de San Angel
programme.desc: La policía pide a Mil Máscaras que desenmascare a un luchador en el ring, al sospechar que es un asaltante.

programme.title: El asesino se embarca
programme.desc: Un grupo de personas que no trabaja en el mismo lugar, intenta conseguir unas placas para falsificar dinero.

programme.title: El cartero del barrio
programme.desc: Un cartero es filmado en secreto para una película mientras una vecina que es actriz finge contar sus penas.

programme.title: Los novios de mis hijas
programme.desc: Un hombre joven promete a su padrino encontrarles esposos buenos a sus cuatro hijas.

programme.title: El cartero del barrio
programme.desc: Un cartero es filmado en secreto para una película mientras una vecina que es actriz finge contar sus penas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Suegra, nuera y yerno, antesala al infierno
programme.desc: Una joven decide no asistir a la escuela para encontrarse con su novio, él la lleva a su casa a conocer a su familia, pero no todos los planes que tienen saldrán como esperan.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale un cobarde vivo que un héroe muerto
programme.desc: Un joven ingresa a una nueva escuela y teme que vuelva a ser víctima de bullying por desgracia, se pone en la mira de uno de sus compañeros. La presión y el continuo bullying hará que el joven llegue a un límite inesperado.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A cada día su pesar y su esperanza
programme.desc: Una joven embarazada descubre que tiene una enfermedad y está decidida a luchar por ella y el bebé que espera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El vivo es vivo, hasta que el tonto quiere
programme.desc: Un chico es amenazado por una banda de extorsionadores que le exigen que pague su derecho de piso. Por lo mismo, el joven se ve obligado a tomar dinero del negocio de su papá con tal de protegerlo. La salud de su padre también se ve comprometida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que debe, paga o ruega
programme.desc: Un joven decide gastar mucho dinero para conquistar a una chica que solo le interesan las cosas materiales, pero aprenderá una gran lección.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A enemigo que huye, puente de plata
programme.desc: Roberta es nueva en el colegio y está a punto de cumplir sus 15 años, así que invita a sus compañeros a su fiesta, pero Eloísa tiene celos de ella y no le dejará el camino tan fácil.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Humano es el errar y divino el perdonar
programme.desc: Durante una sesión fotográfica en la calle una chica sufre un accidente que la deja parapléjica. La madre de la joven culpa a su hijo por el accidente y está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para que su hija vuelva a caminar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Educar no es llenar una cubeta, sino encender una hoguera
programme.desc: Una maestra llega a una comunidad para ayudar a la gente a aprender un idioma, pero descubre que las personas del lugar se avergüenzan de su origen.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces imitan a otros artistas y los pequeños cantan a dúo con ellos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los equipos cantan a dúo con Bianca, María José, Fanny Lu y Edith Márquez. Rogelio, el capitán de Mega Estrellas, personifica a Jo-Jo-Jorgito Falcón.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los bailarines de cada escuadrón hacen espectaculares bailes junto a Bianca, María José y Raquel. El cantante de cada equipo le canta a un ser querido.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los Irresistibles son el primer escuadrón en pasar a la semifinal. El grupo Megabait presenta su primer video musical.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.desc: Un programa especial que muestra la vida de cuatro jugadores de fútbol americano en Brownsville, Texas, quienes se enfrentan a una dura realidad de violencia, pobreza, drogas, pero siempre con ilusión de una vida mejor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Narcosubmarinos: Viaje al fondo del mal
programme.desc: Por décadas el narcotráfico ha navegado sigilosamente por los mares más peligrosos para transportar su mercancía, poniendo en peligro la vida de sus tripulantes a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia destruida tras un ataque inesperado habla sobre todo lo que sufrieron al perder a sus seres queridos en manos de organizaciones delictivas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: El hijo del Chapo: Captura y liberación de un intocable
programme.desc: El ejército mexicano despliega un operativo en Culiacán, Sinaloa, para detener a un familiar de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, 'El Chapo'. El objetivo es capturado y, durante un día, Culiacán queda atrapada en un enfrentamiento entre el ejército y los narcos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Fentanilo la nueva apuesta del narco
programme.desc: México es país productor y de tránsito de Fentanilo, un opioide sintético cada vez más consumido en Estados Unidos. Esta droga causa muchas muertes entre jóvenes. Un kilo de fentanilo genera las mismas ganancias que una tonelada de cocaína.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias que pierden a sus seres queridos en la inmensidad del desierto sin poder hacer nada para saber de ellos, pero la esperanza no muere y arriesgarán todo para recuperarlos.

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: Michael Mossman
programme.sub-title: Munich Philharmonic Hall: Michel Camilo Quintet
programme.desc: Well-known for his exuberant style and intimate familiarity with a vast range of jazz and Latin idioms, Michel Camilo has always had a sixth sense for musical adventure. Camilo was one of the most stimulating jazz pianists to emerge in the mid- to late '80s. His powerful two-handed attack (full of impressive technical skills), his knowledge of both jazz and Afro-Cuban music, and his willingness to constantly take chances turn each of his solos into an adventure. This broadcast was taped during the 1991 Münchner Klaviersommer, when Camilo was playing with his amazing Quintet. He is accompanied by Ned Mann (bass), Cliff Almond (drums), Michel Mossman (trumpet and trombone) and Ralph Bowen (saxophone and flute). Camilo's rise to fame has been swift, and his influences range from jazz musicians like Art Tatum and Keith Jarrett to twentieth-century composers like Debussy and Ravel.

programme.title: Ted Curson
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Eliane Elias
programme.desc: There's no question about it: with a Grammy for Best Latin Jazz Album for her recording ‘Made In Brazil', seven previous Grammy nominations, four ‘Gold Disc Awards', and three ‘Best Vocal Album Awards' in Japan, Eliane Elias has taken her place in the pantheon of music giants. In her projects, Elias wears many hats: she serves as producer, composer, lyricist, arranger, pianist, and vocalist. In this concert broadcast, recorded live at the Philharmonie in Munich, Elias shows her distinctive and immediately recognizable musical style, which blends her Brazilian samba roots and her sensuous, alluring voice with her impressive instrumental bebop, jazz, classical, and compositional skills. She is an artist beyond category, and in this concert she performs with Jay Randall Anderson (bass) and Adam Nussbaum (drums).

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Popa Chubby
programme.sub-title: Popa Chubby - It's A Mighty Hard Road
programme.desc: Popa Chubby, born as Ted Horowitz, is an American blues singer and guitarist, who has become one of the most popular figures of New York's blues scene. Early on in his career he released the album 'Booty and the Beast' (1995), which became one of the 1990s's best-selling blues albums. Chubby describes his own style as "The Stooges meets Buddy Guy, Motörhead meets Muddy Waters, and Jimi Hendrix meets Robert Johnson". As part of the French music festival Blues sur Seine, Chubby and his band played a great blues rock concert, showcasing the artist's powerful and soulful guitar playing. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Simone Signoret on November 8, 2019.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Astrud Gilberto & Dizzy Gillespie
programme.sub-title: Gilberto, Gillespie & Skymasters - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1982, Dutch big band The Skymasters accompanied monumental jazz trumpet legend Dizzy Gillespie and the Brazilian bossa nova singer Astrud Gilberto at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague.

programme.title: Ballet of the Mariinsky Theatre
programme.desc: 'La Bayadère' is a three-act ballet by the French choreographer Marius Petipa. Set in 19th-century India, 'La Bayadère' tells the sad love story of the noble warrior Solor and his Nikia, a temple dancer or 'bayadère', who is poisoned by her rival, Gamzatti. The ballet features one of the most celebrated scenes of classical ballet, namely 'The Kingdom of the Shades'. In this iconic scene, Solor dreams, under the influence of opium, of reuniting with his beloved Nikia. This production of the ballet features the revised choreography by Vladimir Ponomarev and Vakhtang Chabukiani (1941), and includes dances by Konstantin Sergeyev and Nikolai Zubkovsky. The ballet's music, composed by Ludwig Minkus, is performed by the Mariinsky Orchestra under the direction of Boris Gruzin. Among the performers are Viktoria Tereshkina, Anastasia Matvienko, Vladimir Shklyarov, and Vladimir Ponomarev. This performance was recorded at the Mariinsky Theatre in St. Petersburg, Russia, in July 2014.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky & Vadim Rudenko
programme.sub-title: Piano Duets - Mozart, Ravel, Rachmaninoff a. o.
programme.desc: In this splendid concert, exceptional Russian pianists Nikolay Lugansky and Vadim Rudenko join forces in a program for two pianos comprising works of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, Maurice Ravel, Anton Arensky, Sergei Rachmaninoff, and Nikolai Kapustin. Both pianists, laureates of the prestigious International Tchaikovsky Competition in 1994, have received international recognition. They perform regularly in a duo. On the program: Mozart's Sonata for two pianos in D major, K. 448/375 A Ravel's La Valse (arr. for two pianos) Arensky's Suite No. 1 for two pianos, Op. 15 and Rachmaninoff's Suite No. 1 (Fantasy) for two pianos, Op. 5. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Romance' from Rachmaninoff's Suite No. 2 for two pianos, Op. 17, followed by ‘Overture' from Nikolai Kapustin's Sinfonietta, Op. 49. This performance was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on November 25, 2021.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. Beethoven composed Symphony No. 5 between 1804 and 1808, completing the work at nearly the same time as his Symphony No. 6, ‘Pastorale'. Both symphonies premiered as part of an all-Beethoven program at the same concert on December 22, 1808. Symphony No. 5 has become one of the best-known compositions in classical music. It opens with the famous four-note motif, often interpreted as the musical manifestation of 'fate knocking at the door'. This rhythmic figure returns in various guises in the other three movements of the symphony. The second movement consists of a set of lyrical variations on two themes. The third movement begins gently, but leads to a blasting horn section presenting a theme that features the rhythmic pattern of the four-note motif. The movement leads uninterrupted to the fourth movement that features a triumphant finale ending in C major. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.
